_doc: wq-048 — consensus engine config. Lifts assumptions-audit.md §2.1–§2.5 lookup tables into structured form. Engine: scripts/derive_collected_revenue.py.

arr_methods._doc: §2.3 — haircut applied to growth-method output (NOT to endingARR before growth math). See engine for placement.

best_period_x12.description: Cherry-picked best 4-week period × 12. Inflates 10–15%. Confirmed by Zitron for OpenAI.

company_profiles._doc: §2.2 — per-company segment mix + NRR + ARR reporting method. Fall back to _default when slug not present.

growth_method_rules._doc: §2.4 — growth method selector. quarterly_data_available is checked first; if Q1.arr..Q4.arr present, use sum_quarterly. Else use ratio = endingARR/startingARR to pick log_mean (>1.5), simple_average (≤1.5), or 60% haircut (no startingARR).

nrr_formula._doc: §2.5 — nrrBoost = 1.0 + (profile.nrr - 1.0) × multiplier (when NRR > 1.0). E.g., NRR 1.50 yields nrrBoost 1.125.

validation_targets._doc: §4.4 hand-curated values used by --validate to gate calibration. ±15% per acceptance criteria #4. iaas dropped pending IaaS provider entity records — see wq-053 Notion card.
